title: Spicy Korean Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with spicy Korean chili flakes and a mix of vegetables.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and Korean chili flakes and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the onion and bell pepper and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Add the snow peas and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until they are tender but still crisp.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, sugar, and salt.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the vegetables and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Serve the stir-fry hot, garnished with additional Korean chili flakes if desired.
